title: Incident Response Plan Not Tested
description: The IR plan has not been tested via tabletop or simulation exercises in the past 12 months.
gap: No recent IR exercises conducted; team may not be prepared for a real incident.
recommendation: Conduct quarterly tabletop exercises and an annual full IR simulation.

title: Gaps in SIEM Coverage for Core Banking
description: Several core banking API endpoints are not covered by SIEM detection rules.
gap: Attacks against core banking APIs may go undetected.
recommendation: Onboard core banking API logs to SIEM and create detection rules.

title: Critical Patches Overdue
description: 14 critical CVEs remain unpatched for more than 90 days.
gap: Extended exposure window increases exploitation risk.
recommendation: Implement an SLA-driven patch management process with executive reporting.

title: PII Encrypted at Rest but Not in Transit on Internal Segments
description: Payment card data is encrypted at rest but transmitted in cleartext on internal network segments.
gap: Internal network attacker could capture cleartext card data.
recommendation: Implement TLS 1.2+ on all internal service-to-service communications.
